detail: Pipeline B: 456 FL firms discovered via DeepSeek, enriched with 5 angles + attorneys + icebreakers. Now wiring into Sales Ops Fly.io for Bouncer/Rapid email verification.

Handoff written to Sales Ops sub-agent. Deep Enricher agent integrated into lead factory (Stage 6), V3 enrichment columns + name ethnicity + cache tables applied to Supabase. 4 migrations live. Pipeline B: 456 FL firms enriched. HANDOFF_2026-06-18.md has 6 test steps for Fly.io validation.
